top_signals.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
top_signals.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Oil extends decline as Trump accuses oil firms of 'gouging' consumers
top_signals.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump intensified pressure on oil companies to lower gasoline prices following the recent decline in crude.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Live markets: Bitcoin could drop to $59,000 in the short-term as liquidity dries up
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Australia ramps up bird flu surveillance, testing after first mainland cases reported
top_signals.summary: Tests are underway after dead sub-Antarctic seabirds and a pelican ​were found more than 1,200 ‌kilometers from where the first ​two confirmed cases were reported.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Gates told Congress Epstein considered blackmailing him
top_signals.summary: In closed-door testimony this month, Gates disputed details that Epstein recorded in emails to himself regarding the Microsoft co-founder's extramarital affairs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
